summary: Fresh re-check (EDGAR + news + halt/probe/delisting sweep) finds NOTHING new since the 17:16 snapshot -- no new July offering, halt, probe or delisting on any held name -- so the book's biggest risk stays the standing distribution/dilution overhang on the three elevated holdings: UUUU (undrawn $300M ATM + net-negative Chalmers Form 144 selling, ~$12.82 down ~25% on the month), NTSK (live post-lockup Lightspeed/Form 144 1.75M Class A distribution overhang despite ICONIQ buying), and WRAP (stock ~$2.24 hovering at the $2.30 warrant strike -> exercise-dilution overhang; also the only held name in the 7/14 nightly audit, though the dashboard now reconciles all 5).

WRAP.note: ~$2.24, at/near the $2.30 warrant strike so the 2.5M common-warrant exercise (Feb-2026 PIPE resale S-3, 5M sh incl. warrants) is the live dilution overhang. Fresh check: NO new 424B5/S-3/8-K offering; $200M baby-shelf is CAPACITY only, recent insiders BUYING. Only held name in the 7/14 nightly audit (source_mismatch 1.555 vs 1.59, stale_cache last 7/8) -> keep a notch up, but dashboard reports ledger+broker agree on all 5 and phantom-sell path stays gated by fix a5484b6. Lorentzian -0.5, FinBERT +0.016. Stop $2.07.

UUUU.note: ~$12.82, down ~25% on the month on uranium-sector softness + VAC/Ara-deal uncertainty. Fresh check confirms $300M Controlled Equity ATM (#333-278193) still UNDRAWN -- no July 424B5 draw. Insider picture net-NEGATIVE by size: Chalmers Form 144 selling (200k 6/29 + 300k 7/9 via RBC, ~$10M+) outweighs the 7/9 CEO 74k/$968k + Hansen buys. Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. Not in nightly audit. Stop $11.94.

NTSK.note: ~$13.88, book's best gainer. Fresh check: NO new S-1/S-3/424B5/secondary -- only the already-scored 7/8 & 7/9 Form 144s (1.75M Class A) + ICONIQ 610k 7/8 & Form 4 7/14 buys + Wells Fargo Buy 7/10. Live post-lockup Lightspeed/Form 144 distribution overhang persists, partly offset by ICONIQ/director buying. Hiring pulse 148 vs 150 (flat, no flag). FinBERT +0.158. Stop $13.17.

CAI.note: ~$17.63, clean: NO shelf/ATM (confirmed prior same-week sweep, no fresh filing), director $990k buy 7/13, Caris Detect launch + PTEN IHC testing, $100M buyback; avg PT ~$28 above price. No halt/probe. FinBERT +0.144. Not in nightly audit. Stop $15.69.

YEXT.note: ~$5.55, NO shelf/ATM; anti-dilutive $140M self-tender replaced the failed Feb take-private; director Englander bought 76,190 sh @ $5.22 (7/13). Hiring pulse 25 vs 24 (flat). No halt/probe. FinBERT 0.0. Dashboard reconciles all 5. Stop $4.95.

flags.why: Only candidate ABOVE the 5.25 buy line (score 5.52, ~$1.72) but BLOCKED as avoid: diluted ~30% via $50M underwritten registered direct (27,624,310 sh @ $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26, 7/6 F-3 resale of 3,030,303 sh. Stock sits BELOW the $1.81 offer; CEO buys came AFTER the raise. Re-check confirms no new July offering. Intel concurs (flags_for_bot).

Radar candidate ~$3.48: textbook pump-and-dump signature -- HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), collapsed to ~$3.48, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto; nightly audit also flags cache stale (last 7/8). Intel concurs.

Radar candidate ~$9.43 with real recent dilution: $300M underwritten offering (23,871,526 sh @ $11.52 + 2,170,138 pre-funded warrants) closed ~5/11. Stock BELOW the $11.52 offer; the insider score is offering-backer/healthcare-fund accumulation, not management conviction. Intel concurs (flags_for_bot).

Radar candidate ~$5.36 / intel flags_for_bot: 12-for-1 reverse split effective 7/14 (new CUSIP G8071C137) purely for Nasdaq $1 compliance on an unfunded AI+blockchain+crypto pivot. Nightly audit shows a reverse-split cache desync (cache 0.386 vs yahoo 6.04). FinBERT +0.919 is a misattributed generic-market headline. Keep vetoed.

Radar candidate ~$1.94 on the avoid list with a severe dilution overhang: ~167M sh out, active $300M S-3 shelf (7/8), 13.95M warrants, authorized shares hiked to 450M. Phase 2 news constructive but capital structure unresolved.
Radar candidate ~$16.42 on the avoid list: automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 2026-01-13, already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM -- ongoing drip-dilution setup.

Radar candidate ~$2.44: distressed reverse-merger -- definitive Serapha Bio merger + $230M concurrent private placement leaves pre-merger holders only ~3.7% of the combined entity; oncology pipeline halted, ~75% workforce cut, hiring pulse now 0 open roles corroborating the wind-down.

Radar candidate ~$3.38 on the avoid list: down ~91% YoY near 52-wk lows despite a token insider buy, 10-for-1 reverse split tied to Nasdaq compliance, pivoting into Dogecoin mining hardware -- distress signal, not a turnaround.
Nasdaq delisting determination after an SEC trading halt tied to social-media pump-and-dump manipulation; suspension effective 7/16 absent appeal. Hard veto if it resurfaces.
Most recent 10-Q discloses going-concern doubt incl. possible Chapter 7 liquidation; just closed a $23.7M private placement (warrant overhang). FinBERT -0.288. Keep hard-vetoed if it resurfaces.

Pending ~$5.8B all-stock acquisition of Valaris (15.235 RIG sh per Valaris sh) dilutes existing holders to ~53% of the combined company and carries a DOJ 'second request' -- earliest close ~9/29. Material dilution + binary-vote risk.

On the avoid list; priced a $100M underwritten offering (13,495,277 sh @ $7.41) on 6/24 -- real dilution alongside the ABS-201 Phase 1 catalyst. FinBERT -0.027 (worst -0.941). Keep flagged so it is not bought as a fresh breakout.
On the avoid list, not held: live $100M ATM (since 2024) plus a Feb-2026 $107.6M underwritten offering (20M sh @ $5.00), now underwater near $3.7 -- ongoing drip-dilution. FinBERT -0.19.

No longer held and off the scan; retained as a do-not-REBUY: serial diluter (~855M sh) with active pump activity (Mandela Dollar stablecoin 7/10, Dream Bowl meme-coin 7/6). Broker_state reconciles clean today.

dilution_watch.note: $300M Controlled Equity Offering (#333-278193) usable now; fresh check shows NO July draw. Chalmers Form 144 selling: 200k sh 6/29 + 300k sh 7/9 via RBC, outweighs the 7/9 CEO 74k buy by size.

PIPE resale S-3 registers 5M sh incl. 2.5M common warrants @ $2.30 strike; stock ~$2.24 (at strike) so warrant-exercise dilution is live. $200M baby-shelf CAPACITY only, NO 424B5 draw; insiders BUYING.
$50M underwritten registered direct (27,624,310 sh @ $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly private placement, closed 6/26. 7/6 F-3 registers 3,030,303 PIPE sh for resale. No NEW July offering.
$300M underwritten offering: 23,871,526 sh @ $11.52 + 2,170,138 pre-funded warrants; closed ~5/11. Stock BELOW the offer; shelf remains available for future draws.
~$5.8B all-stock Valaris acquisition; existing holders diluted to ~53% of combined co; DOJ second request pushes earliest close to ~9/29.
Definitive Serapha Bio merger + $230M concurrent private placement; existing holders diluted to ~3.7% pro forma. Hiring pulse now 0 open roles.
$300M shelf plus 13.95M warrants; authorized shares hiked to 450M -- severe overhang.
$23.7M private placement; going-concern disclosure in most recent 10-Q.
Automatic shelf effective, used twice via 424B5; $50M ATM active.
$107.6M underwritten offering now underwater; $100M ATM remains active.

disagreements: UUUU: intel frames the CEO/Hansen insider BUYS prominently ('no boost'); the Chalmers Form 144 SALE stack (200k 6/29 + 300k 7/9 via RBC, ~$10M+) outweighs the ~$1M of buying by size, so the insider signal behind the score is net-NEGATIVE -- reinforced by the ~25% one-month drawdown to ~$12.82.

NTSK: intel narrates the ICONIQ/director BUYS as the story; the offsetting Lightspeed VC sales plus the 7/8 Form 144 (1.75M Class A) are a live post-lockup distribution overhang -- the net float pressure is why this stays elevated despite the gain.

WRAP: intel cites the price-cache desync as elevated grounds; the dashboard now reports ledger+broker agree on all 5, so that desync appears reconciled on the live feed -- WRAP stays elevated instead on the fresh read that stock sits at the $2.30 warrant strike (exercise overhang), and it is the sole held name still in the 7/14 nightly audit.
Overtrading (carried): radar shows the weekly buy budget at 9/4 used -- the budget check is BLOCKING new buys, but the over-cap pace is a standing discipline flag independent of any single ticker.
